announcement: Thanks for visiting DesertStitchLeather! Each headcover and gift is hand-cut and hand-stitched to order.
digital_sale_message: Thank you for your order! Questions about sizing or leather color? Message the shop anytime.
policy_refunds: 30-day return policy on unused, uncustomized items.
policy_shipping: Made to order and shipped within 3-5 business days.
policy_welcome: Welcome to DesertStitchLeather — handcrafted leather golf headcovers and small artisan gifts from a one-person workshop in Tucson.
sale_message: Your leather goods are on the bench. Thank you for supporting a small maker.
title: Handcrafted Leather Golf Headcovers and Gifts
